name: Collins
history: Worked overseas and built a website related to that work. Recurrent pattern of starting new ideas and later abandoning projects when difficulties arise. Family-related difficulty involving his father; wrote a personal letter as part of a forgiveness process.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must control my environment to avoid chaos.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't meet my expectations, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Attempts to control situations and people around him to prevent perceived chaos.
situation: Working on a personal project involving the development of a website.
auto_thought: I need to control everything to prevent failure.
behavior: Becomes controlling and critical, especially towards grandchildren.
